goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have free parking'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get address and postcode
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should be in the same area as the attraction
The hotel doesn't need to include internet
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get whether they have free parking
